arts.ttl: Five Championship players Leicester City should poach to kickstart promotion bid
arts.sum: While Leicester City may not officially be a Championship club yet, the inevitability of their relegation means they need to start thinking about how they get back up to the Premier League. Targeting Coventry’s Haji Wright would not only get City one of the best all-around strikers in the Championship, but would also infuriate their neighbours down the M69.

arts.ttl: Exciting Jeremy Monga revelation as Ruud van Nistelrooy explains plan for 15-year-old
arts.sum: Manager Ruud van Nistelrooy has confirmed that Monga will be considered for selection for the remaining seven Premier League matches and suggested he was keen to get him involved, saying “within reason we have to use him as much as we can”. But van Nistelrooy believes Monga already possesses the physical and mental attributes he needs alongside his talent.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy opens door for Harry Winks as Gary Neville weighs in on 'massive problem'
arts.sum: Winks has not been in the City squad for the past two matches and it has been reported that van Nistelrooy omitted the midfielder over his long commute to training and his unwillingness to remain at the training ground overnight once a week. The door is open for Harry Winks to regain his place in the Leicester City squad but Ruud van Nistelrooy continues to turn down opportunities to discuss their alleged dispute.
